markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Resolve Navan's security roadblocks to finalize the GrowthX engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/XnXBsvsRzL82VwqxtEPmVvNZ3mY2Enx5?tab=summary&timestamp=18.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Access is the Blocker:** Navan's security policy requires a company laptop for G Suite access (GSC/GA4), which conflicts with GrowthX's agency model.](https://fathom.video/share/XnXBsvsRzL82VwqxtEPmVvNZ3mY2Enx5?tab=summary&timestamp=18.0)
  - [**CMS Access is Optional:** Direct CMS access is not required if Navan provides a dedicated resource for timely (within days) publishing of 5 articles/week to prevent project bottlenecks.](https://fathom.video/share/XnXBsvsRzL82VwqxtEPmVvNZ3mY2Enx5?tab=summary&timestamp=72.0)
  - [**AI Tool Transparency is Required:** Navan needs a list of AI models (e.g., Claude, GPT) used in GrowthX's proprietary platform to meet its security policy, which previously blocked another vendor (X-Funnel).](https://fathom.video/share/XnXBsvsRzL82VwqxtEPmVvNZ3mY2Enx5?tab=summary&timestamp=469.0)
  - [**Proposed Solution:** GrowthX will use a private Slack channel for collaboration and its own research artifacts for content creation, avoiding the need for direct access to Navan's internal data.](https://fathom.video/share/XnXBsvsRzL82VwqxtEPmVvNZ3mY2Enx5?tab=summary&timestamp=685.0)

## Topics

### The Access Dilemma

  - [**Problem:** Navan's security policy requires a company laptop for G Suite access (GSC, GA4), which conflicts with GrowthX's agency model.](https://fathom.video/share/XnXBsvsRzL82VwqxtEPmVvNZ3mY2Enx5?tab=summary&timestamp=18.0)
  - [**Constraint:** GrowthX cannot use Navan-issued laptops, as this would classify them as "contingent workers" and create significant delivery problems.](https://fathom.video/share/XnXBsvsRzL82VwqxtEPmVvNZ3mY2Enx5?tab=summary&timestamp=765.0)
  - [**Proposed Workaround:** GrowthX can operate without direct access if Navan provides a dedicated resource to pull reports and publish content.](https://fathom.video/share/XnXBsvsRzL82VwqxtEPmVvNZ3mY2Enx5?tab=summary&timestamp=72.0)

### CMS Publishing Workflow

  - [**Requirement:** A dedicated Navan resource for timely publishing is critical to avoid project bottlenecks.](https://fathom.video/share/XnXBsvsRzL82VwqxtEPmVvNZ3mY2Enx5?tab=summary&timestamp=72.0)
  - [**Context:** GrowthX targets 5 articles/week, with publishing starting in weeks 4–6.](https://fathom.video/share/XnXBsvsRzL82VwqxtEPmVvNZ3mY2Enx5?tab=summary&timestamp=173.0)
  - [**Rationale:** Delays of several days would prevent GrowthX from scaling content production and achieving desired results.](https://fathom.video/share/XnXBsvsRzL82VwqxtEPmVvNZ3mY2Enx5?tab=summary&timestamp=116.0)

### Analytics & Reporting

  - [**Preference:** Direct access to GSC and GA4 is preferred to enable GrowthX to update a shared Looker dashboard and track performance.](https://fathom.video/share/XnXBsvsRzL82VwqxtEPmVvNZ3mY2Enx5?tab=summary&timestamp=362.0)
  - [**Rationale:** Direct access allows GrowthX to make data-driven strategy adjustments, which is difficult when "flying blind."](https://fathom.video/share/XnXBsvsRzL82VwqxtEPmVvNZ3mY2Enx5?tab=summary&timestamp=362.0)
  - [**Alternative:** Navan's SEO owner, Moran (Tel Aviv), could pull and send reports, though time zone overlap with a US-based GrowthX team is limited.](https://fathom.video/share/XnXBsvsRzL82VwqxtEPmVvNZ3mY2Enx5?tab=summary&timestamp=230.0)

### AI Tool Transparency

  - [**Requirement:** Navan's security policy demands a list of all AI models used in GrowthX's platform.](https://fathom.video/share/XnXBsvsRzL82VwqxtEPmVvNZ3mY2Enx5?tab=summary&timestamp=469.0)
  - [**Rationale:** This is a strict policy; Navan previously blocked vendor X-Funnel for failing to disclose its AI models.](https://fathom.video/share/XnXBsvsRzL82VwqxtEPmVvNZ3mY2Enx5?tab=summary&timestamp=603.0)
  - [**GrowthX Platform:** A proprietary platform using best-in-class models (e.g., Claude Sonnet 4.5, GPT).](https://fathom.video/share/XnXBsvsRzL82VwqxtEPmVvNZ3mY2Enx5?tab=summary&timestamp=583.0)
  - [**Offer:** GrowthX can set up a Scrunch dashboard for Navan to provide end-to-end visibility into the AI workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/XnXBsvsRzL82VwqxtEPmVvNZ3mY2Enx5?tab=summary&timestamp=637.0)

### Collaboration & Review Process

  - [**Collaboration:** A private Slack channel hosted by GrowthX is the preferred and most efficient method for communication.](https://fathom.video/share/XnXBsvsRzL82VwqxtEPmVvNZ3mY2Enx5?tab=summary&timestamp=285.0)
  - [**Content Review:** The process uses an email alias for initial editorial review, with final approval from Rich, Libby, or Andrew.](https://fathom.video/share/XnXBsvsRzL82VwqxtEPmVvNZ3mY2Enx5?tab=summary&timestamp=902.0)
  - [**Goal:** Limit the number of reviewers to streamline the process and prevent delays.](https://fathom.video/share/XnXBsvsRzL82VwqxtEPmVvNZ3mY2Enx5?tab=summary&timestamp=902.0)

### Contract Status

  - [**Security Addendum:** Final review in progress at GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/XnXBsvsRzL82VwqxtEPmVvNZ3mY2Enx5?tab=summary&timestamp=995.0)
  - [**MSA & SoW:** In a good place; Mithil is confirming PO structure and payment terms.](https://fathom.video/share/XnXBsvsRzL82VwqxtEPmVvNZ3mY2Enx5?tab=summary&timestamp=995.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Tyler:**](https://fathom.video/share/XnXBsvsRzL82VwqxtEPmVvNZ3mY2Enx5?tab=summary&timestamp=677.0)
      - [Email Nima a list of AI models used in the GrowthX platform.](https://fathom.video/share/XnXBsvsRzL82VwqxtEPmVvNZ3mY2Enx5?tab=summary&timestamp=677.0)
      - [Send the Slack channel invite link upon approval.](https://fathom.video/share/XnXBsvsRzL82VwqxtEPmVvNZ3mY2Enx5?tab=summary&timestamp=959.0)
  - [**Nima:**](https://fathom.video/share/XnXBsvsRzL82VwqxtEPmVvNZ3mY2Enx5?tab=summary&timestamp=959.0)
      - [Secure approval for GrowthX to join the private Slack channel.](https://fathom.video/share/XnXBsvsRzL82VwqxtEPmVvNZ3mY2Enx5?tab=summary&timestamp=959.0)
      - [Identify a Navan resource for timely CMS publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/XnXBsvsRzL82VwqxtEPmVvNZ3mY2Enx5?tab=summary&timestamp=72.0)
      - [Determine if GSC/GA4 access is feasible or if Moran will pull reports.](https://fathom.video/share/XnXBsvsRzL82VwqxtEPmVvNZ3mY2Enx5?tab=summary&timestamp=362.0)
      - [Schedule a pre-kickoff call with the core team once all approvals are complete.](https://fathom.video/share/XnXBsvsRzL82VwqxtEPmVvNZ3mY2Enx5?tab=summary&timestamp=1045.0)
